content: I mesi del calendario ebraico sono: Tishri, Cheshvan, Kislev, Tevet, Shevat, Adar, Nisan, Iyar, Sivan, Tammuz, Av ed Elul.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by marvinibahs2020 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:The months of the Hebrew calendar are﹕ Tishrei, Cheshvan, Kislev, Tevet, Shevat, Adar, Nissan, Iyyar, Sivan, Tammuz, Av
